verses.meaning_en: He who cherishes desires and his mind dwells with his longings, is by his desires born again wherever they lead him, but the man who has won all his desire and has found his soul, for him even here in this world vanish away all desires.
verses.verse_skt:
कामान्‌ यः कामयते मन्यमानः स कामभिर्जायते तत्र तत्र।
पर्याप्तकामस्य कृतात्मनस्तु इहैव सर्वे प्रविलीयन्ति कामाः ॥
verses.verse_tl:
kāmān yaḥ kāmayate manyamānaḥ sa kāmabhirjāyate tatra tatra |
paryāptakāmasya kṛtātmanastu ihaiva sarve pravilīyanti kāmāḥ ||

verses.anvaya_skt: अयम् आत्मा प्रवचनेन न लभ्यः  न मेधया न बहुना श्रुतेन यम् एव एषः वृणुते। तेन लभ्यः  तस्य एषः आत्मा स्वां तनुं विवृणुते ॥
verses.anvaya_tl: ayam ātmā pravacanena na labhyaḥ  na medhayā na bahunā śrutena yam eva eṣaḥ vṛṇute | tena labhyaḥ  tasya eṣaḥ ātmā svāṁ tanuṁ vivṛṇute ||
verses.auro_md: This Self is not won by exegesis, nor by brain-power, nor by much learning of Scripture. Only by him whom It chooses can It be won; to him this Self unveils its own body.

glossary.meaning_en: nor by much learning of Scripture
only by him can It be won

verses.hindi_explain:
यह 'आत्मा' प्रवचन द्वारा लभ्य नहीं हैं, न ही मेधा-शक्ति और न शास्त्रों को बहुत अधिक जानने-सुनने से प्राप्य है। केवल वही 'उसे' प्राप्त कर सकता है जिसका 'यह वरण करता है; केवल उसके प्रति ही यह 'आत्मा' अपने स्वरूप का उद्घाटन करता है। 
<sup>९</sup>शंकर ने इसे वीर्य के अर्थ में ग्रहण किया है, वीर्य, जो कि जगत् में जन्म का कारण है। किन्तु सम्भव है कि इसका अर्थ यह होː ''इस ज्योतिर्मय जगत् से परे चले जाते हैं'', यह ज्योतिर्मय जगत् जिसका अभी-अभी उल्लेख हुआ है इससे परे महत्तर 'प्रकाश' में चले जाते हैं, जो स्वयं 'परम ब्रह्म' है तथा जो उसका धाम एवं उसकी योनि (उत्पत्ति स्थल) है।
<sup>१०</sup>अथवा, ''कामनाओं को समाप्त कर लिया है।"
verses.meaning_en: This Self is not won by exegesis, nor by brainpower, nor by much learning of Scripture. Only by him whom It chooses can It be won; to him this Self unveils its own body.
verses.verse_skt:
नायमात्मा प्रवचनेन लभ्यो न मेधया न बहुना श्रुतेन।
यमेवैष वृणुते तेन लभ्यस्तस्यैष आत्मा विवृणुते तनूं स्वाम्‌ ॥
verses.verse_tl:
nāyamātmā pravacanena labhyo na medhayā na bahunā śrutena |
yamevaiṣa vṛṇute tena labhyastasyaiṣa ātmā vivṛṇute tanūṁ svām ||

verses.anvaya_skt: अयम् आत्मा बलहीनेन न लभ्यः  प्रमादात् च न वा अलिङ्गात् तपसः अपि  न लभ्यः  यः विद्वान् एतैः उपायैः यतते  तस्य एषः आत्मा ब्रह्मधाम विशते ॥
verses.anvaya_tl: ayam ātmā balahīnena na labhyaḥ  pramādāt ca na vā aliṅgāt tapasaḥ api ( na labhyaḥ ) yaḥ vidvān etaiḥ upāyaiḥ yatate  tasya eṣaḥ ātmā brahmadhāma viśate ||
verses.auro_md: This Self cannot be won by any who is without strength, nor with error in the seeking, nor by an askesis without the true mark: but when a man of knowledge strives by these means his self enters into Brahman, his abiding place.

glossary.meaning_en: the one who is without strength
nor with error in the seeking
nor even by an askesis without the true mark
but when a man of knowledge

verses.hindi_explain: यह 'परमात्मा' बलहीन व्यक्ति के द्वारा लभ्य नहीं है, न ही प्रमादपूर्ण प्रयास से, और न ही लक्षणहीन तपस्या के द्वारा प्राप्य है, किन्तु जब कोई विद्वान् इन उपायों के द्वारा प्रयत्न करता है तो उसका आत्मा ब्रह्म-धाम में प्रवेश कर जाता है।
verses.meaning_en: This Self cannot be won by any who is without strength, nor with error in the seeking, nor by an askesis without the true mark: but when a man of knowledge strives by these means his self enters into Brahman, his abiding place.
verses.verse_skt:
नायमात्मा बलहीनेन लभ्यो न च प्रमादात्‌ तपसो वाप्यलिङ्गात्‌।
एतैरुपायैर्यतते यस्तु विद्वांस्तस्यैष आत्मा विशते ब्रह्मधाम ॥
verses.verse_tl:
nāyamātmā balahīnena labhyo na ca pramādāt tapaso vāpyaliṅgāt |
etairupāyairyatate yastu vidvāṁstasyaiṣa ātmā viśate brahmadhāma ||

verses.anvaya_skt: एनम् सम्प्राप्य ऋषयः ज्ञानतृप्ताः कृतात्मानः वीतरागाः प्रशान्ताः  भवन्ति  ते युक्तात्मानः धीराः सर्वगं सर्वतः प्राप्य सर्वम् एव आविशन्ति ॥
verses.anvaya_tl: enam samprāpya ṛṣayaḥ jñānatṛptāḥ kṛtātmānaḥ vītarāgāḥ praśāntāḥ ( bhavanti ) te yuktātmānaḥ dhīrāḥ sarvagaṁ sarvataḥ prāpya sarvam eva āviśanti ||
verses.auro_md: Attaining to him, seers glad with fullness of knowledge, perfected in the Self, all passions cast from them, tranquillised,—these, the wise, come to the all-pervading from every side, and, uniting themselves with him, enter utterly the All.
verses.hindi_explain: 'उसे' प्राप्त करके, ज्ञान की पूर्णता से संतृप्त ऋषिगण जिन्होंने 'आत्मा' की पूर्णता प्राप्त कर ली है, जो समस्त कामनाओं से मुक्त (वीतराग) हैं, प्रशान्त हैं, उस सर्वव्यापी को सब ओर से प्राप्त करते हैं तथा उससे स्वयं को युक्त करके ये विद्वान् उस 'सर्वात्म-रूप' में पूर्णरूप से प्रवेश कर जाते हैं।
verses.meaning_en: Attaining to him, seers glad with fullness of knowledge, perfected in the Self, all passions cast from them, tranquillised, -these, the wise, come to the all-pervading from every side, and, uniting themselves with him, enter utterly the All.
verses.verse_skt:
संप्राप्यैनमृषयो ज्ञानतृप्ताः कृतात्मानो वीतरागाः प्रशान्ताः 
ते सर्वगं सर्वतः प्राप्य धीरा युक्तात्मानः सर्वमेवाविशन्ति ॥
verses.verse_tl:
saṁprāpyainamṛṣayo jñānatṛptāḥ kṛtātmāno vītarāgāḥ praśāntāḥ 
te sarvagaṁ sarvataḥ prāpya dhīrā yuktātmānaḥ sarvamevāviśanti ||

verses.anvaya_skt: वेदान्तविज्ञानसुनिश्चितार्थाः सन्न्यासयोगात् शुद्धसत्त्वाः ते सर्वे यतयः परान्तकाले ब्रह्मलोकेषु परामृताः परिमुच्यन्ति ॥
verses.anvaya_tl: vedāntavijñānasuniścitārthāḥ sannyāsayogāt śuddhasattvāḥ te sarve yatayaḥ parāntakāle brahmalokeṣu parāmṛtāḥ parimucyanti ||
verses.auro_md:
Doers of askesis who have made sure of the aim[^11] of the whole-knowledge of Vedanta, the inner being purified by the Yoga of renunciation, all in the hour of their last end passing beyond death are released into the worlds of the Brahman.

[^11]: Or, "meaning".

glossary.meaning_en: who have made sure of the aim of the whole knowledge of Vedanta
in the hour of their last end
into the worlds of the Brahman

verses.hindi_explain: वे तपस्वीजन जिन्होंने वेदान्त के समग्रज्ञान (विज्ञान) के लक्ष्य<sup>११</sup> को निश्चित रूप से जान लिया है, संन्यासयोग के द्वारा जिनकी अन्तर सत्ता पूर्णतः परिशुद्ध हो चुकी है, वे सब अपने अन्तकाल में, मृत्यु के परे जाकर ब्रह्मलोक में सर्वथा मुक्त हो जाते हैं।
verses.meaning_en: Doers of askesis who have made sure of the aim of the whole knowledge of Vedanta, the inner being purified by the Yoga of renunciation, all in the hour of their last end passing beyond death are released into the worlds of the Brahman.
verses.verse_skt:
वेदान्तविज्ञानसुनिश्चितार्थाः संन्यासयोगाद्‌ यतयः शुद्धसत्त्वाः।
ते ब्रह्मलोकेषु परान्तकाले परामृताः परिमुच्यन्ति सर्वे ॥
verses.verse_tl:
vedāntavijñānasuniścitārthāḥ saṁnyāsayogād yatayaḥ śuddhasattvāḥ |
te brahmalokeṣu parāntakāle parāmṛtāḥ parimucyanti sarve ||

verses.anvaya_skt: तेषां पञ्चदश कलाः प्रतिष्ठाः गताः भवन्ति सर्वे देवाः च प्रतिदेवतासु गताः भवन्ति तेषाम् कर्माणि विज्ञानमयः आत्मा च सर्वे परे अव्यये एकीभवन्ति ॥
verses.anvaya_tl: ( teṣāṁ ) pañcadaśa kalāḥ pratiṣṭhāḥ gatāḥ ( bhavanti ) sarve devāḥ ca pratidevatāsu ( gatāḥ bhavanti ) ( teṣām ) karmāṇi vijñānamayaḥ ātmā ca sarve pare avyaye ekībhavanti ||
verses.auro_md: The fifteen parts return into their foundations, and all the gods pass into their proper godheads, works and the Self of Knowledge,—all become one in the Supreme and Imperishable.
verses.hindi_explain:
पन्द्रह कलाएँ अपनी-अपनी प्रतिष्ठा (आधारभूत स्थिति) में लौट जाती हैं, तथा समस्त देवगण अपने-अपने देवत्व में चले जाते हैं, कर्म तथा 'विज्ञानमय आत्मा'-सभी उस 'परम' 'अविनाशी' 'परमात्मा' में हो जाते हैं।
<sup>११</sup>अथवा, ''अर्थ''
verses.meaning_en: The fifteen parts return into their foundations, and all the gods pass into their proper godheads, works and the Self of Knowledge,-all become one in the Supreme and Imperishable.
verses.verse_skt:
गताः कलाः पञ्चदश प्रतिष्ठा देवाश्च सर्वे प्रतिदेवतासु।
कर्माणि विज्ञानमयश्च आत्मा परेऽव्यये सर्वे एकीभवन्ति ॥
verses.verse_tl:
gatāḥ kalāḥ pañcadaśa pratiṣṭhā devāśca sarve pratidevatāsu |
karmāṇi vijñānamayaśca ātmā pare'vyaye sarve ekībhavanti ||

verses.anvaya_skt: यथा स्यन्दमानाः नद्यः नामरूपे विहाय समुद्रे अस्तं गच्छ्नति  तथा विद्वान् नामरूपात् विमुक्तः परात् परं दिव्यं पुरुषम् उपैति ॥
verses.anvaya_tl: yathā syandamānāḥ nadyaḥ nāmarūpe vihāya samudre astaṁ gacchnati  tathā vidvān nāmarūpāt vimuktaḥ parāt paraṁ divyaṁ puruṣam upaiti ||
verses.auro_md:
As rivers in their flowing reach their home[^12] in the ocean and cast off their names and forms, even so one who knows is delivered from name and form and reaches the Supreme beyond the Most High, even the Divine Person.

[^12]: Or, "come to their end".

glossary.meaning_en: is delivered from name and form
the Supreme beyond the Most High

verses.hindi_explain: जिस प्रकार प्रवाहित होती हुई नदियां अपने धाम, समुद्र में पहुँच जाती हैं<sup>१२</sup> और अपने नाम तथा रूप को छोड़ देती हैं, उसी प्रकार विद्वान नाम तथा रूप से मुक्त होकर 'परात्पर' 'परम दिव्यपुरुष' को प्राप्त हो जाता है।
verses.meaning_en: As rivers in their flowing reach their home in the ocean and cast off their names and forms, even so one who knows is delivered from name and form and reaches the Supreme beyond the Most High, even the Divine Person.
verses.verse_skt:
यथा नद्यः स्यन्दमानाः समुद्रेऽस्तं गच्छन्ति नामरूपे विहाय।
तथा विद्वान्‌ नामरूपाद् विमुक्तः परात्परं पुरुषमुपैति दिव्यम्‌ ॥
verses.verse_tl:
yathā nadyaḥ syandamānāḥ samudre'staṁ gacchanti nāmarūpe vihāya |
tathā vidvān nāmarūpād vimuktaḥ parātparaṁ puruṣamupaiti divyam ||

verses.anvaya_skt: यः ह वै तत् परमं ब्रह्म वेद  सः ब्रह्म एव भवति  अस्य कुले अब्रह्मवित् न भवति। सः शोकं तरति पाप्मानं तरति  गुहाग्रन्थिभ्यः विमुक्तः अमृतः भवति ॥
verses.anvaya_tl: yaḥ ha vai tat paramaṁ brahma veda  saḥ brahma eva bhavati  asya kule abrahmavit na bhavati| saḥ śokaṁ tarati pāpmānaṁ tarati  guhāgranthibhyaḥ vimuktaḥ amṛtaḥ bhavati ||
verses.auro_md: He, verily, who knows that Supreme Brahman becomes himself Brahman; in his lineage none is born who knows not the Brahman. He crosses beyond sorrow, he crosses beyond sin, he is delivered from the knotted cord of the secret heart and becomes immortal.

glossary.meaning_en: none is born who knows not the Brahman
from the knotted cord of the secret heart

verses.hindi_explain: वस्तुतः वह जो कि उस 'परम ब्रह्म' को जानता है वह स्वयं 'ब्रह्म' बन जाता है; उसके कुल में 'ब्रह्म' को न मानने वाला पैदा नहीं होता। वह शोक से पार हो जाता है, वह पापों से तर जाता है, वह हृद्गुहा की ग्रंथियों से मुक्त होकर अमर हो जाता है।
verses.meaning_en: He, verily, who knows that Supreme Brahman becomes himself Brahman; in his lineage none is born who knows not the Brahman. He crosses beyond sorrow, he crosses beyond sin, he is delivered from the knotted cord of the secret heart and becomes immortal.
verses.verse_skt:
स यो ह वै तत्‌ परमं ब्रह्म वेद ब्रह्मैव भवति नास्याब्रह्मवित् कुले भवति।
तरति शोकं तरति पाप्मानं गुहाग्रन्थिभ्यो विमुक्तोऽमृतो भवति ॥
verses.verse_tl:
sa yo ha vai tat paramaṁ brahma veda brahmaiva bhavati nāsyābrahmavit kule bhavati |
tarati śokaṁ tarati pāpmānaṁ guhāgranthibhyo vimukto'mṛto bhavati ||

verses.anvaya_skt: तत् एतत् ऋचा अभ्युक्तम्।  ये  क्रियावन्तः श्रोत्रियाः ब्रह्मनिष्ठाः श्रद्धयन्तः  एकर्षिं जुह्वते  यैः तु विधिवत्  शिरोव्रतं चीर्णं तेषाम् एव एताम् ब्रह्मविद्यां वदेत ॥
verses.anvaya_tl: tat etat ṛcā abhyuktam| ( ye ) kriyāvantaḥ śrotriyāḥ brahmaniṣṭhāḥ śraddhayantaḥ  ekarṣiṁ juhvate  yaiḥ tu vidhivat  śirovrataṁ cīrṇaṁ teṣām eva etām brahmavidyāṁ vadeta ||
verses.auro_md: This is That declared by the Rig Veda. Doers of works, versed in the Veda, men absorbed in the Brahman, who putting their faith in the sole-seer offer themselves to him sacrifice,—to them one should speak this Brahman-knowledge, men by whom the Vow of the Head has been done according to the rite.

glossary.meaning_en: who putting their faith in the sole seer

verses.hindi_explain: यह 'वह' है जिसका ऋग्वेद में कथन किया गया है। कर्म करने वाले, श्रोत्रिय, ब्रह्मनिष्ठः जो 'एक-ऋषि' में श्रद्धा रखते है स्वयं को उसके प्रति समर्पित करके यजन करते हैं, केवल उन्हीं को यह ब्रह्म-विद्या बतानी चाहिये जिन्होंने 'शिरोन्नत' का विधिवत् पालन किया है।
verses.meaning_en: This is That declared by the Rig Veda. Doers of works, versed in the Veda, men absorbed in the Brahman, who putting their faith in the sole seer offer themselves to him sacrifice,-to them one should speak this Brahman-knowledge, men by whom the Vow of the Head has been done according to the rite.
verses.verse_skt:
तदेतदृचाऽभ्युक्तम्‌ - -क्रियावन्तः श्रोत्रिया ब्रह्मनिष्ठाः स्वयं जुह्वत एकर्षिं श्रद्धयन्तः।
तेषामेवैतां ब्रह्मविद्यां वदेत शिरोव्रतं विधिवद्‌ यैस्तु चीर्णम्‌ ॥
verses.verse_tl:
tadetadṛcā'bhyuktam - -kriyāvantaḥ śrotriyā brahmaniṣṭhāḥ svayaṁ juhvata ekarṣiṁ śraddhayantaḥ |
teṣāmevaitāṁ brahmavidyāṁ vadeta śirovrataṁ vidhivad yaistu cīrṇam ||

verses.anvaya_skt: तत् एतत् सत्यम् ऋषिः अङ्गिराः पुरा उवाच। अचीर्णव्रतः एतत् न अधीते। नमः परमऋषिभ्यः नमः परमऋषिभ्यः ॥
verses.anvaya_tl: tat etat satyam ṛṣiḥ aṅgirāḥ purā uvāca | acīrṇavrataḥ etat na adhīte| namaḥ paramaṛṣibhyaḥ namaḥ paramaṛṣibhyaḥ ||
verses.auro_md: This is That, the Truth of things, which the seer Angiras spoke of old. This none learns who has not performed the Vow of the Head. Salutation to the seers supreme! Salutation to the seers supreme!

glossary.meaning_en: who has not performed the Vow of the Head

verses.hindi_explain:
यह है 'वह', 'यथार्थ सत्य' जिसे पुराकाल में अंगिरा ऋषि ने बताया था। जिसने 'शिरोव्रत' का पालन नहीं किया वह इसका अध्ययन नहीं करता। परम ऋषियों को नमन! परम ऋषियो को नमन!
<sup>१२</sup> अथवा ''विलीन हो जाती हैं।''
verses.meaning_en: This is That, the Truth of things, which the seer Angiras spoke of old. This none learns who has not performed the Vow of the Head. Salutation to the seers supreme! Salutation to the seers supreme!
verses.verse_skt:
तदेतत्‌ सत्यमृषिरङ्गिराः पुरोवाच नैतदचीर्णव्रतोऽधीते।
नमः परमऋषिभ्यो नमः परमऋषिभ्यः ॥
verses.verse_tl:
tadetat satyamṛṣiraṅgirāḥ purovāca naitadacīrṇavrato'dhīte |
namaḥ paramaṛṣibhyo namaḥ paramaṛṣibhyaḥ ||
